reason: Backend conventions overview: async-first, no repository layer, pydantic-settings, no linting/CI靠 uv run pytest + 手验 — governs new feed_worker/feed_batch/http_client modules
Forbidden patterns (no bare except pass, no request-injected DB sessions in background tasks) — directly applies to worker pool / scheduler background code using async_session()
HTTPException conventions + 202/502 status code usage; refresh-all→202, refresh_feed→502 must follow these
SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + Alembic patterns; new 018_feed_disabled migration + batch builder query must follow
Log level/pattern conventions for scheduler tick / worker success/fail / per-host skip logs
Four-layer routers→services→models+schemas layout; new services/http_client.py, services/feed_batch.py, services/feed_worker.py placement
Feature spans API+service+DB+frontend (progress status, feed badges) — cross-layer data flow checklist
fetch_and_store_feed shared between due-tick / manual-refresh / refresh-all paths; shared httpx client — reuse audit
